name: Magic Marshmallow Crescent Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and cinnamon.
2. Dip each marshmallow into the melted butter, then roll in the cinnamon mixture. Set aside.
- This step can be done ahead of time; store the prepared marshmallows with the butter in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
3. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Remelt any saved butter before proceeding.
5. Unroll the crescent dough and separate into triangles.
6. Place a sugared marshmallow on the narrow tip end of each dough triangle.
7. Sprinkle chopped nuts over the marshmallow.
8. Fold the corners of the dough inward and roll up tightly, ensuring one side is coated in melted butter.
9. Place each puffed crescent roll with the butter side down into a muffin tin.
10. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes until golden brown.
Glaze (optional):
- For mornings when you have more time, mix powdered sugar, milk, and vanilla together. Drizzle over warm rolls before serving.
- The glaze is not necessary; the puffs are delicious even without it, tasting very homemade-like.
